title: Model
description: A reinforcement learning model trained for DeepRacer autonomous racing.

modelArn.description: The ARN uniquely identifying the reinforcement learning model.

modelName.description: The display name of the model.

creationTime.description: Timestamp when the model was created.

lastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp when the model was last updated.

trainingJobArn.description: ARN of the SageMaker training job that produced this model.

rewardFunction.description: Python reward function code used during training.
